title: Review round 1: mph Message methods
notes: Calibration review complete. Confidence: 95% no correctness bugs missed. All four methods (message_set_update, message_set_destroy, message_query_changes, message_query) correctly implement RFC 8620 §5.3/5.6 with proper validation guards, conditional patch building, and JSON structure. Tests: 92/92 pass. Known issue: ReactionChange lacks #[non_exhaustive] (forward-compat risk, not correctness bug). Unexamined: ReactionChange::Remove untested but code is correct. Running out of real complaints: yes.
